subject: Fermi GBM trigger 686435254/221002852 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (USRA/NASA-MSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 686435254/221002852
at 20:27:29.00 UT on 2 October 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to an X-Class solar flare."
